summary: Tested PunchList enhancement features: description validation, tasks in job form, task-check endpoint, crew/contractor complete endpoints, dispute endpoint, and all UI components. All 14 backend tests and all frontend scenarios passed.
seed_data_creation: Added crew1 (050fc3ca-b479-40ad-adee-6ff9346039e8) to crew_accepted of job 9a6f8b29-a502-4a31-afe4-8d7a53749e73 (completed_pending_review) to enable rate-btn test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PunchList features verified. Task job (9a6f8b29) has 3 tasks, status=completed_pending_review, crew1 now in crew_accepted. Itinerary route is /jobs-itinerary (not /itinerary). Footer buttons: crew gets Submit Complete + Report Issue + Rate Contractor (on completed_pending_review). Contractor gets Set Complete + Report Issue. Dispute modal (data-testid=dispute-modal) opens correctly. Task checkboxes (data-testid=task-check-{jobId}-{idx}) visible in PunchList section of itinerary card.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/jobs/ with empty description returns 400
Backend: POST /api/jobs/ with whitespace description returns 400
Backend: POST /api/jobs/ with tasks array saves tasks field
Backend: GET /api/jobs/{id} returns tasks, task_completions, crew_submitted_at, images fields
Backend: PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/task-check with valid task_idx returns {ok:true}
Backend: PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/task-check with invalid task_idx returns 400
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/crew-complete records timestamp (crew1 on task job)
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/crew-complete returns 403 for contractor
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/contractor-complete sets status/returns 200
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/contractor-complete returns 403 for crew
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/dispute saves to disputes and returns id
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/dispute with empty reason returns 400
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/dispute with whitespace reason returns 400
Frontend: job-desc-input has required attribute
Frontend: task-input and add-task-btn present in Post Job form
Frontend: Adding task appears in task-list
Frontend: Removing task (remove-task-0) removes from list
Frontend: job-images-input present
Frontend: Task checkboxes (task-check-{id}-{idx}) visible for job with tasks
Frontend: Clicking task checkbox calls task-check endpoint
Frontend: footer-crew-complete-btn (Submit Complete) visible for crew
Frontend: footer-contractor-complete-btn (Set Complete) visible for contractor
Frontend: footer-dispute-btn (Report Issue) visible
Frontend: Clicking Report Issue opens dispute-modal
Frontend: footer-rate-btn (Rate Contractor) appears for crew on completed_pending_review job
